title: Germany's military shuns Palantir for now, cyber chief tells Handelsblatt

title: Meta to backtrack acquisition of AI firm Manus after China block: report
summary: Meta is reportedly reversing its acquisition of AI startup Manus. China has banned the deal, citing national security. The AI agent was founded in China but is now based in Singapore. Meta stated the transaction complied with law. Analysts had warned of regulatory issues amid US-China tech rivalry.
